page: Microsoft Azure E96-48ads_v7 is an Eadsv7-family virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per core. Additionally, it includes 5669 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates strong performance characteristics. Single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and single-threaded compression/decompression tasks rank in the top tier (top 10%). Multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and Redis SET operations fall within the top 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show strong write performance and cached read performance, though uncached large-block reads perform at an average level.

Given the high memory density and substantial local storage capacity, this server offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads without requiring GPU acceleration. The lack of a GPU limits its utility for heavy deep learning training, but its high single-core speed and large memory footprint make it highly suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E96-48ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs and 24 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, offering a high memory-to-core ratio of 16 GB per core, alongside 5669 GB of local storage. In benchmark testing, the instance delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong multi-core capabilities, particularly in database operations and Redis SET transactions. The server provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads that do not require GPU acceleration. It is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, and intensive enterprise data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96-48ads_v7 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 48 vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 5669 GB local storage, delivering top-tier single-core performance for databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E96-48ads_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 48 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 5669 GB local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A high-memory virtual machine with fast single-core AMD processors and extensive local storage for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 48 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing 16 GB of memory per core
Includes 5669 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Delivers top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
